name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service with 3 convenient locations in Knightdale, NC, offering domestic and international money sending/receiving at retail partner locations.
description_long:
MoneyGram is a global money transfer service that operates through a network of retail partner locations rather than company-owned branches. In Knightdale, North Carolina, MoneyGram services are available at three established retail partners: Walmart #1816, CVS #7529, and Mi Casa Grocery. This distributed model allows MoneyGram to reach customers through familiar, high-traffic retail environments where consumers already shop.

MoneyGram's core offering centers on money transfers—both domestic (within the United States) and international remittances. Customers can send and receive money through both online and offline channels, providing flexibility in how they access the service. The three Knightdale locations offer extended hours, with all three open until 9:00 PM, supporting after-work and evening transactions. The service integrates money transfer functionality into everyday retail settings, making it accessible alongside grocery shopping, pharmacy needs, or general retail purchases.

What distinguishes MoneyGram is its extensive retail partnership network, which eliminates the need for standalone locations while maintaining high accessibility. The service operates in all three major retail categories in Knightdale—big-box retail (Walmart), pharmacy/convenience (CVS), and specialty grocery (Mi Casa Grocery)—demonstrating broad community integration. The online-plus-offline hybrid model allows customers to initiate transfers digitally and complete them in-person, or conduct entirely in-person transactions.

A practical assessment reveals MoneyGram serves customers seeking straightforward money transfer services at convenient times and locations. However, the service is transaction-focused rather than comprehensive financial solutions, and fees for money transfers are not disclosed on this locational page, requiring customers to inquire directly. The service works best for customers with established transfer needs rather than those exploring multiple financial options.
pros: Three convenient Knightdale locations across Walmart, CVS, and Mi Casa Grocery for accessibility
Extended hours until 9:00 PM at all three locations for after-work and evening transactions
Hybrid online and offline service options for flexible money transfer methods
Operates at high-traffic retail locations where customers already shop and visit regularly
Serves both domestic and international money transfer needs
Established, globally-recognized brand with long operational history in money transfers
cons: No fees or pricing information disclosed on the location page; customers must call or inquire directly
Limited to three specific partner locations in Knightdale with no company-owned branches
Transaction-focused service without broader financial products or accounts
No information provided about transfer speed, limits, or currency exchange rates on location page
Dependent on retail partner hours and policies, not independent operating hours
best_for: Customers sending money domestically to family or friends across the United States
Immigrants and expatriates sending remittances to family internationally
Individuals who prefer conducting financial transactions at familiar retail locations during extended evening hours
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for customers with established money transfer needs who value convenience and extended retail location hours. The main caveat is that pricing, fees, and specific transfer terms are not disclosed on the location page, requiring direct customer contact with individual retailers for complete information.
services: Domestic money transfers within the United States
In-person money sending at retail partner locations
In-person money receiving at retail partner locations
Online transfer initiation with in-person pickup
Multi-location service access across Walmart, CVS, and specialty grocers
